narration: Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?
visual_description: Context visual: Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Heart valves control blood flow, ensuring it moves in the right direction. But how do they do this?

narration: There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.
visual_description: Escalation visual: There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: There are four main valves: tricuspid, pulmonary, mitral, and aortic. Each plays a critical role.

narration: They open and close with each heartbeat, preventing backflow. But what happens when they malfunction?
visual_description: Evidence visual: They open and close with each heartbeat, preventing backflow. But what happens when they malfunction?
